text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 A woman in her sixties was lightly wounded when a Hezbollah rocket struck the northern city of Nahariya. She was injured by the blast and glass shards. The Israeli military said fewer than ten rockets were launched from Lebanon; most were intercepted, but one hit near a residential building. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 一名六旬妇女在真主党火箭弹袭击以色列北部城市纳哈里亚时受轻伤。她是被爆炸和玻璃碎片所伤。以色列军方表示，从黎巴嫩发射的火箭弹不到十枚；大多数被拦截，但有一枚击中了一栋住宅楼附近。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 🇮🇹 "We strongly condemn the manipulative use of the recent cover of L'Espresso." - Israeli Ambassador to Italy ℹ️ The magazine literally used a real photo for their cover. Nothing was manipulated. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇮🇹 “我们强烈谴责对《L'Espresso》杂志最新一期封面的操纵性使用。” - 以色列驻意大利大使 ℹ️ 该杂志确实使用了真实照片作为封面。没有任何东西被操纵。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Two Hezbollah fighters of Armenian origin have been killed in fighting in southern Lebanon. Adam Khrikhor Hachmian, a Christian who converted to Shia Islam, adopted the name Adam and was buried according to Shia customs. Manuel Babakian, a senior field commander from the group’s “founders’ generation” known as “Mano the Armenian”, was also killed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 两名亚美尼亚裔真主党武装人员在黎巴嫩南部的战斗中丧生。亚当·克里科尔·哈奇米安（Adam Khrikhor Hachmian）是一名皈依什叶派伊斯兰教的基督徒，他取名亚当并按照什叶派习俗下葬。该组织“创始人一代”的高级战地指挥官曼努埃尔·巴巴基安（Manuel Babakian，被称为“亚美尼亚人马诺”）也已阵亡。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇧🇭 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Bahrain’s Crown Prince Salman bin Hamad Al Khalifa, who is also deputy supreme commander of the armed forces and prime minister, met with U.S. Central Command chief Admiral Brad Cooper to discuss strengthening strategic partnership in military and defence fields. The Crown Prince highlighted the historic role of bilateral ties in deterring Iranian attacks. The two also reviewed regional developments. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇧🇭 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 巴林王储萨勒曼·本·哈马德·阿勒哈利法（同时担任武装部队副最高统帅和首相）会见了美国中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀海军上将，讨论加强军事和国防领域的战略伙伴关系。王储强调了双边关系在威慑伊朗袭击方面的历史性作用。双方还回顾了地区局势的发展。 @wfwitness

text: Iran Threatens Gulf Ports as U.S. Imposes Naval Blockade Iran’s Khatam al-Anbiya Central HQ Spokesperson Ebrahim Zolfaghari said no port in the Gulf will be safe if Iranian ports were threatened, after U.S. military announced a blockade of Iranian ports starting Monday. READ MORE
text_zh: 伊朗威胁海湾港口，美国实施海军封锁。伊朗哈塔姆·安比亚中央总部发言人易卜拉欣·佐尔法加里表示，如果伊朗港口受到威胁，海湾地区将没有港口是安全的。此前美国军方宣布从周一开始对伊朗港口实施封锁。 阅读更多

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 NPR : A senior Hezbollah field commander, using the nom de guerre Jihad, stated that the group has adopted a new decentralised command structure under leader Naim Qassem. Fighters are divided into semi‑autonomous units that do not communicate with each other to avoid Israeli surveillance. “One specialises in shooting, another watches the road. Another might even specialise in wrapping sandwiches for the fighters,” he said. Following the 2024 pager attacks, Hezbollah no longer imports electronics and uses old Motorola devices, handwritten notes and couriers on motorbikes. The commander admitted mistakes led to the killing of Hassan Nasrallah. He claimed Hezbollah did not disarm but gave the Lebanese army empty boxes and old items. Smuggling weapons through Syria remains possible despite Assad’s fall, and the group manufactures some weapons domestically using internet tutorials. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 NPR：一名使用代号“圣战”（Jihad）的真主党高级战地指挥官表示，该组织在领导人纳伊姆·卡西姆的领导下采用了新的去中心化指挥结构。武装人员被分成半自治单位，彼此之间不进行通信以避免以色列的监视。“一个单位专门负责射击，另一个负责观察道路。甚至可能有人专门负责为武装人员包裹三明治，”他说。在2024年寻呼机袭击事件后，真主党不再进口电子产品，而是使用旧的摩托罗拉设备、手写笔记和摩托车信使。该指挥官承认错误导致了哈桑·纳斯鲁拉的死亡。他声称真主党并没有解除武装，而是给了黎巴嫩军队空箱子和旧物品。尽管阿萨德倒台，但通过叙利亚走私武器仍然可行，该组织利用互联网教程在国内制造了一些武器。 @wfwitness

text: 🇭🇺 Péter Magyar calls for Hungary's President to resign saying that he didn't say a word when thousands of Hungarian children were abused by pedophiles 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 彼得·马扎尔（Péter Magyar）呼吁匈牙利总统辞职，称当数千名匈牙利儿童受到恋童癖者虐待时，他一言不发。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 The governor of Tehran Mohammad-Sadegh Motamedian said U.S. and Israeli attacks constitute war crimes, with 40,000 residential homes damaged in the province. Emergency services, schools and even UNESCO‑listed historical sites have been hit. He added that there is international silence in the face of such crimes, and that Iran will document and pursue the crimes through international bodies. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 德黑兰省省长穆罕默德-萨德格·莫塔梅迪安表示，美国和以色列的袭击构成了战争罪，该省有40,000处住宅受损。紧急服务设施、学校甚至联合国教科文组织列出的历史遗迹都遭到了袭击。他补充说，面对此类罪行，国际社会保持沉默，伊朗将记录这些罪行并通过国际机构进行追究。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Al-Akhbar: Israeli forces have destroyed the ancient fortress and shrine of Simon al-Safa in the town of Shama, southern Lebanon, using ground bulldozers and airstrikes. The site, located about 5 kilometers from the Israeli border, is traditionally associated with St. Peter. Israeli Army Radio reports that it was the scene of a clash about a year and a half ago in which Israeli researcher Zeev Erlich and Golani soldier Gur Kehati were killed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Al-Akhbar：以色列军队使用地面推土机和空袭摧毁了黎巴嫩南部沙马镇的西蒙·阿勒-萨法（Simon al-Safa）古堡和圣地。该遗址距离以色列边境约5公里，传统上与圣彼得有关。以色列陆军电台报道称，大约一年半前，这里曾发生过冲突，以色列研究员泽夫·埃利希（Zeev Erlich）和戈拉尼旅士兵古尔·凯哈蒂（Gur Kehati）在冲突中丧生。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺🇷🇺Kremlin spokesman Peskov said that Russia respects the results of the Hungarian election. "Hungary has made its choice. We respect this choice. We expect to continue our very pragmatic contacts with the new leadership of Hungary. We heard the statement…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 Kremlin spokesman Peskov reports that the offer to hold enriched Iranian uranium is still in effect but hasn't been requested. Reporter: "Can I ask a second question about Iran? Russia's offer to accept Iranian enriched uranium. Is it still in force?" Peskov: "This offer was voiced by President Putin in contacts with the United States and regional states. This offer is still in force, but it was not requested." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺🇷🇺克里姆林宫发言人佩斯科夫表示，俄罗斯尊重匈牙利选举的结果。“匈牙利做出了选择。我们尊重这一选择。我们期待继续与匈牙利新领导层进行非常务实的接触。我们听到了声明……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 克里姆林宫发言人佩斯科夫报告称，接收伊朗浓缩铀的提议仍然有效，但尚未收到请求。记者：“我可以问第二个关于伊朗的问题吗？俄罗斯接收伊朗浓缩铀的提议。它仍然有效吗？”佩斯科夫：“这一提议是普京总统在与美国和地区国家接触时提出的。这一提议仍然有效，但没有被要求。” @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu: “We are not talking about 5 positions in southern Lebanon, but a security belt to eliminate the threat of a Hezbollah ( ground) invasion and push back the missile threat”
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡：“我们谈论的不是黎巴嫩南部的5个阵地，而是一个安全带，以消除真主党（地面）入侵的威胁并击退导弹威胁”

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 The U.S. Navy aircraft carrier USS George H.W. Bush (CVN-77) has passed through the Strait of Gibraltar and is heading toward CENTCOM’s area of responsibility, where three carrier strike groups are already concentrated. 🇮🇱 Israel’s Channel 12, citing the Prime Minister’s Office, reports that the ceasefire with Iran may end in the near future. 🔹 As U.S. forces are expected to begin a naval blockade of Iran within hours, the Israel Defense Forces say they remain at the highest level of readiness for any scenario. 🔹 The IDF also noted that, for now, there are no changes to civilian guidance, but the military is prepared to resume operations against Iran if necessary. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：🇺🇸 美国海军乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰（CVN-77）已穿过直布罗陀海峡，正前往中央司令部责任区，那里已经集结了三个航母打击群。 🇮🇱 以色列第12频道援引总理办公室的话报道称，与伊朗的停火可能在不久的将来结束。 🔹 由于预计美国军队将在数小时内开始对伊朗实施海军封锁，以色列国防军表示，他们对任何情况都保持最高级别的战备状态。 🔹 以色列国防军还指出，目前平民指导方针没有变化，但军方已准备好在必要时恢复对伊朗的行动。与我们一起查看最新更新： @NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @DylanMalyasov : Ukraine says its intelligence directorate carried out two rocket launches into space during wartime, including one reaching 204 kilometers above Earth. Officials also disclosed what they described as Europe’s first launch of a rocket carrier from a transport aircraft at 8,000 meters altitude, marking a rare aerospace development revealed during active combat operations. Read more https://defence-blog.com/ukraine-confirms-rocket-launches-into-space-during-wartime/ tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）转发 @DylanMalyasov：乌克兰称其情报局在战时进行了两次火箭发射，其中一次达到了地球上方204公里。官员们还披露了他们所描述的欧洲首次从运输机在8000米高度发射火箭载具，标志着在积极战斗行动中披露的一项罕见的航空航天发展。阅读更多 https://defence-blog.com/ukraine-confirms-rocket-launches-into-space-during-wartime/ 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇷🇺 Kremlin spokesman Peskov said that Russia respects the results of the Hungarian election. "Hungary has made its choice. We respect this choice. We expect to continue our very pragmatic contacts with the new leadership of Hungary. We heard the statement about the readiness to engage in dialogue. Of course, this will be useful for Moscow and Budapest." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇷🇺 克里姆林宫发言人佩斯科夫表示，俄罗斯尊重匈牙利选举的结果。“匈牙利做出了选择。我们尊重这一选择。我们期待继续与匈牙利新领导层进行非常务实的接触。我们听到了关于准备进行对话的声明。当然，这对莫斯科和布达佩斯都有好处。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 Kan: The U.S. military has sent a formal notice to mariners detailing enforcement of the naval blockade in the Gulf of Oman and the Arabian Sea, east of the Strait of Hormuz. The blockade applies to all vessels regardless of flag. Any ship entering…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 A senior U.S. official told Al Jazeera that Washington is prepared to enforce the naval blockade on Iran with sufficient forces. The blockade will remain in place as long as U.S. President Trump determines, and the U.S. is not currently considering conflict scenarios if it is violated. U.S. Central Command has informed sailors that any ship attempting to breach the blockade will be intercepted and seized. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 Kan：美国军方已向海员发出正式通知，详细说明在霍尔木兹海峡以东的阿曼湾和阿拉伯海执行海军封锁的情况。封锁适用于所有船只，无论悬挂何种旗帜。任何进入……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 一名美国高级官员告诉半岛电视台，华盛顿准备以足够的兵力执行对伊朗的海军封锁。只要美国总统特朗普决定，封锁就会持续下去，美国目前不考虑如果封锁被违反会发生冲突的情况。美国中央司令部已通知海员，任何试图突破封锁的船只都将被拦截和扣押。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Iran’s new defence minister, Majid Ebn-e-Reza, said Tehran is ready for any scenario and will respond “strongly and forcefully, making enemies regret any aggression”. @wfwitness

text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 红色警报警报器在以色列北部纳哈里亚及对抗线周边地区响起。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 The USS George H.W. Bush (CVN-77) has crossed the Strait of Gibraltar. It is now the third U.S. aircraft carrier entering the Iran theater. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰（CVN-77）已穿过直布罗陀海峡。它现在是第三艘进入伊朗战区的美国航空母舰。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Funeral held for Lebanese Red Cross paramedic Hassan Badawi, who was killed after an Israeli drone strike targeted his team on the road to Beit Yahoun. The Red Cross condemned the incident, stating that the ambulance and its crew were clearly marked and visible from all directions, with illuminated emblems, describing the strike as a deliberate attack on first responders. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 为黎巴嫩红十字会护理人员哈桑·巴达维（Hassan Badawi）举行了葬礼，他在以色列无人机袭击贝特亚洪（Beit Yahoun）路上的救援队后丧生。红十字会谴责了这一事件，称救护车及其船员有明显的标记，从各个方向都可以看到，并带有发光的标志，称这次袭击是对急救人员的蓄意攻击。 @wfwitness

text: ✌️ 🇮🇶 Hamas leadership council head Muhammad Darwish congratulated Iraqi President Nizar Muhammad Sa'id al-Amidi on his election, wishing him success. He affirmed that al-Amidi's election represents an important step toward strengthening stability and national unity in Iraq, reflecting the great confidence he enjoys. Darwish emphasized Hamas's pride in the fraternal relations and historical solidarity between the Palestinian and Iraqi peoples, stressing the importance of continued Iraqi support for the Palestinian cause to achieve freedom, independence, and return.
text_zh: ✌️ 🇮🇶 哈马斯领导委员会主席穆罕默德·达尔维什（Muhammad Darwish）祝贺伊拉克总统尼扎尔·穆罕默德·赛义德·阿米迪（Nizar Muhammad Sa'id al-Amidi）当选，并祝愿他取得成功。他申明，阿米迪的当选是加强伊拉克稳定和民族团结的重要一步，反映了他所享有的巨大信任。达尔维什强调，哈马斯为巴勒斯坦和伊拉克人民之间的兄弟关系和历史团结感到自豪，并强调伊拉克继续支持巴勒斯坦事业以实现自由、独立和回归的重要性。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli drone activity detected over Beirut and Dahieh. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 在贝鲁特和达希耶上空探测到以色列无人机活动。 @wfwitness

text: 🇭🇺 💬 🇷🇺 🇨🇳 Péter Magyar: The Kremlin has spoken, and Beijing has spoken. I thank them for their respectful acceptance of the decision of the Hungarian electorate, the Hungarian people, and they are also open to pragmatic cooperation, just as Hungary is, because geography is geography. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 💬 🇷🇺 🇨🇳 彼得·马扎尔：克里姆林宫已经表态，北京也已经表态。我感谢他们对匈牙利选民、匈牙利人民决定的尊重接受，他们也像匈牙利一样对务实合作持开放态度，因为地理就是地理。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Péter Magyar: The Kremlin has spoken, and Beijing has spoken. I thank them for their respectful acceptance of the decision of the Hungarian electorate, the Hungarian people, and they are also open to pragmatic cooperation, just as Hungary is, because geography is geography.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔：克里姆林宫已经表态，北京也已经表态。我感谢他们对匈牙利选民、匈牙利人民决定的尊重接受，他们也像匈牙利一样对务实合作持开放态度，因为地理就是地理。

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇭🇺 "Viktor Orbán played such a five-dimensional chess game, and this was probably one of the reasons for his defeat, among others. He talked about everything: Ukraine, Russia, Iran, the Iranian Shah, the Iranian Ayatollah, the US presidential election. …" 🇭🇺 "We will refrain from interfering in the domestic affairs of any other country. We ask the same of all countries for Hungary." - Peter Magyar 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇭🇺 “维克托·欧尔班玩了一场五维国际象棋，这可能是他失败的原因之一，除其他原因外。他谈论了一切：乌克兰、俄罗斯、伊朗、伊朗沙阿、伊朗阿亚图拉、美国总统大选。……” 🇭🇺 “我们将避免干涉任何其他国家的内政。我们也要求所有国家对匈牙利这样做。” - 彼得·马扎尔 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇭🇺 "Viktor Orbán played such a five-dimensional chess game, and this was probably one of the reasons for his defeat, among others. He talked about everything: Ukraine, Russia, Iran, the Iranian Shah, the Iranian Ayatollah, the US presidential election. Probably, if he had been woken from his sleep, he would have said that he won the US presidential election, not Donald Trump. Viktor Orbán talked about everything except for the problems affecting the Hungarian people." - Peter Magyar 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 “维克托·欧尔班玩了一场五维国际象棋，这可能是他失败的原因之一，除其他原因外。他谈论了一切：乌克兰、俄罗斯、伊朗、伊朗沙阿、伊朗阿亚图拉、美国总统大选。可能，如果他从睡梦中被叫醒，他会说他赢得了美国总统大选，而不是唐纳德·特朗普。维克托·欧尔班谈论了一切，除了影响匈牙利人民的问题。” - 彼得·马扎尔 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Péter Magyar: Viktor Orbán played such a five-dimensional chess game, and this was probably one of the reasons for his defeat, among others. He talked about everything: Ukraine, Russia, Iran, the Iranian Shah, the Iranian Ayatollah, the US presidential election. Probably, if he had been woken from his sleep, he would have said that he won the US presidential election, not Donald Trump. Viktor Orbán talked about everything except for the problems affecting the Hungarian people.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔：维克托·欧尔班玩了一场五维国际象棋，这可能是他失败的原因之一，除其他原因外。他谈论了一切：乌克兰、俄罗斯、伊朗、伊朗沙阿、伊朗阿亚图拉、美国总统大选。可能，如果他从睡梦中被叫醒，他会说他赢得了美国总统大选，而不是唐纳德·特朗普。维克托·欧尔班谈论了一切，除了影响匈牙利人民的问题。

text: ELINT News RT @ShalomLipner : "Pakistani, Egyptian & Turkish mediators will continue talks with the US & Iran in coming days in an effort to bridge remaining gaps... mediators hope narrowing the gaps could enable another round of negotiations before the ceasefire expires." @BarakRavid https://www.axios.com/2026/04/13/us-iran-nuclear-talks-ceasefire-deal tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转发 @ShalomLipner：“巴基斯坦、埃及和土耳其的调解人将在未来几天继续与美国和伊朗进行会谈，努力弥合剩余的分歧……调解人希望缩小分歧能在停火到期前促成新一轮谈判。” @BarakRavid https://www.axios.com/2026/04/13/us-iran-nuclear-talks-ceasefire-deal 推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @DefenseBulletin : Keeping this in mind, it’s now just under two hours before the U.S. blockade of vessels leaving Iranian ports and vessels paying tolls to Iran is set to begin. According to Barak Ravid, citing a senior U.S. official, following the failed U.S.-Iran talks in Islamabad, Pakistan, mediators from Turkey, Pakistan, And Egypt will continue talks with their U.S. counterparts in an attempt to find points of convergence between the U.S. and Iranian sides. Per the report, mediators, who still believe a lasting ceasefire is possible, hope to realize the aforementioned goals before the ceasefire deadline on April 12, 2026. - OSINTdefender tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转发 @DefenseBulletin：请记住这一点，距离美国开始封锁离开伊朗港口的船只和向伊朗支付通行费的船只还有不到两个小时。据巴拉克·拉维德（Barak Ravid）援引一名美国高级官员的话称，在美伊伊斯兰堡会谈失败后，来自土耳其、巴基斯坦和埃及的调解人将继续与美国同行进行会谈，试图找到美伊双方的交汇点。根据报道，仍然相信持久停火是可能的调解人希望在2026年4月12日的停火截止日期前实现上述目标。 - OSINTdefender 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran's ambassador to India: "Iran has oil and is ready to sell to any country that wants it." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗驻印度大使：“伊朗有石油，并准备卖给任何想要的国家。” 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to Barak Ravid, citing a senior U.S. official, following the failed U.S.-Iran talks in Islamabad, Pakistan, mediators from Turkey, Pakistan, And Egypt will continue talks with their U.S. counterparts in an attempt to find points of convergence between the U.S. and Iranian sides. Per the report, mediators, who still believe a lasting ceasefire is possible, hope to realize the aforementioned goals before the ceasefire deadline on April 12, 2026. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据巴拉克·拉维德（Barak Ravid）援引一名美国高级官员的话称，在美伊伊斯兰堡会谈失败后，来自土耳其、巴基斯坦和埃及的调解人将继续与美国同行进行会谈，试图找到美伊双方的交汇点。根据报道，仍然相信持久停火是可能的调解人希望在2026年4月12日的停火截止日期前实现上述目标。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Turkish foreign Minister Fidan essentially says the U.S. has no agency: "Israel is not a structure that produces power on its own. There is a mindset here that has managed to hack the American political system through Zionism. What the United States does in this region does not serve its own interests, but benefits Israel. So why does the United States do this? It is not a rational model of behavior. It happens when you influence (American) politics." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：土耳其外交部长菲丹本质上说美国没有代理权：“以色列不是一个能独立产生权力的结构。这里有一种心态，通过犹太复国主义成功地黑进了美国政治体系。美国在这个地区所做的事情并不符合其自身利益，而是使以色列受益。那么美国为什么要这样做呢？这不是一种理性的行为模式。当你影响（美国）政治时，就会发生这种情况。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran’s judiciary chief Gholam-Hossein Mohseni-Eje’i: “Our military forces have their fingers on the trigger. The temporary ceasefire has not weakened or slowed these fighters.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043665020580516149/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗司法总长戈拉姆-侯赛因·莫赫塞尼-埃杰伊（Gholam-Hossein Mohseni-Eje’i）：“我们的军事力量手指扣在扳机上。临时停火并没有削弱或减缓这些战士的速度。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043665020580516149/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Ebrahim Rezaei spokesman for the Iranian National Security Committee: Donald Trump is “bluffing” about blocking the Strait of Hormuz https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043664636000498113/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：伊朗国家安全委员会发言人易卜拉欣·礼萨伊（Ebrahim Rezaei）：唐纳德·特朗普关于封锁霍尔木兹海峡的言论是在“虚张声势” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043664636000498113/photo/1 推文

text: ELINT News RT @IranNuances : Khatam al-Anbiya Central HQ spokesperson warned that security in Persian Gulf is “either for everyone or for no one.” He said if Iranian ports are threatened, “no port in Persian Gulf or Sea of Oman will be safe,” asserting #Iran ’s right to defend its territorial waters. https://twitter.com/IranNuances/status/2043664330361545183/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转发 @IranNuances：哈塔姆·安比亚中央总部发言人警告说，波斯湾的安全“要么属于所有人，要么属于任何人”。他说，如果伊朗港口受到威胁，“波斯湾或阿曼湾的任何港口都不会安全”，并断言#伊朗 有权保卫其领海。 https://twitter.com/IranNuances/status/2043664330361545183/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel EU's von der Leyen: We need to scale up the homegrown, affordable, reliable energy, this is the wide range of different renewables we have, but it is also the nuclear. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043663796938445061/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：欧盟冯德莱恩：我们需要扩大本土的、负担得起的、可靠的能源，这是我们拥有的各种可再生能源，但它也是核能。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043663796938445061/video/1 推文

text: Péter Magyar: We will refrain from interfering in the domestic affairs of any other country. We ask the same of all countries for Hungary.
text_zh: 彼得·马扎尔：我们将避免干涉任何其他国家的内政。我们也要求所有国家对匈牙利这样做。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 无人机警报警报器在以色列北部对抗线周边地区活跃。 @wfwitness” ⚡ 🇮🇱 红色警报警报器在以色列北部对抗线周边地区响起。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Zionist Media Channel 13: "There are SO MANY Iranian spies in Israel, they formed a Special Unit with Shin Bet and the Police. So far there are 38 Cases with over 50 spies, Israelis are selling out Israel for a few bucks, not a lot of money..."
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 犹太复国主义媒体第13频道：“以色列有太多的伊朗间谍，他们与辛贝特（Shin Bet）和警察组成了一个特别小组。到目前为止，有38起案件涉及50多名间谍，以色列人为了几个钱出卖以色列，钱并不多……”
